### Post by fantab on 2013-02-20
[s]YES it works. Your problem sounds familiar if you are not using the default 'Ambiance' GKT theme...[/s]

EDIT: CCSM  is working but the text beside check boxes is missing since my last update.

### Post by rrnbtter on 2013-02-21
Greetings,

> **alphacrucis2 said:**
> I just get headings with check boxes and no text. Is this still supposed to work?

1. Yes, it is supposed to work.
2. Yes it is broken.
3. Yes it will be fixed.
4. When........Don't know!

### Post by grahammechanical on 2013-02-21
I am using the default Ambience theme and CCSM is broken on my Raring install. I just checked. The links still work as do the mouse tool tips. I also notice that the Unity plugin is missing.

I guess that Compiz and may be the Compiz Configuration Settings Manager are under going a period of development and not just work-arounds for bug fixes. This is what makes running the development branch interesting.

Regards.

---

### Post by ventrical on 2013-02-21
I did a fresh install yesterday from the Feb 12th i386 iso, downloaded ccsm and it works just great on this:
01:00.0 VGA compatible controller: Advanced Micro Devices [AMD] nee ATI RV350 AP [Radeon 9600]
01:00.1 Display controller: Advanced Micro Devices [AMD] nee ATI RV350 AP [Radeon 9600] (Secondary)

---

### Post by rrnbtter on 2013-02-27
Greetings,
All back working today in Compiz with repo updates.  Also had some Claws Email updates come through, but it didn't fix my Indicator.  Claws hasn't released v3.9 yet for Raring and their Indicator only works with the new version.  Hence don't know what the updates were for. Everything else in Claws worked fine.

---

### Post by grahammechanical on 2013-02-27
To tell the truth I never did work out what all those settings did. But I notice that we can now reduce the Launcher icon size lower than 32 - down to 8. This may have been brought in earlier. I have not been checking.

Regards.

---

### Post by rrnbtter on 2013-02-27
Greetings,

> **grahammechanical said:**
> To tell the truth I never did work out what all those settings did. But I notice that we can now reduce the Launcher icon size lower than 32 - down to 8. This may have been brought in earlier. I have not been checking.
Regards.

Actually the entire Unity Plug-in has been missing.  One really helpful setting that I have found for myself is in the "Grab Handle" setting.  I set the fade up to 250 instead of the default 150 and the grab handles on the windows are much more manageable.

### Post by alphacrucis2 on 2013-02-28
Yep it's working again now. I miss the extras - especially burn windows on close. If I knew anything about programming I'd have a go at resurrecting that plugin.

---

### Post by cariboo on 2013-02-28
@ventrical. in your first post with pictures., it looks like you tried to drag n' drop an image into your post using Firefox. There is a base-64 bug in Firefox, that breaks the image, and could cause problems with other browsers. We've had some users that can't get pages to load because of this error. It is best to use the attachment manager or a picture hosting service to upload images for the time being

---

### Post by ventrical on 2013-03-01
> **cariboo907 said:**
> @ventrical. in your first post with pictures., it looks like you tried to drag n' drop an image into your post using Firefox. There is a base-64 bug in Firefox, that breaks the image, and could cause problems with other browsers. We've had some users that can't get pages to load because of this error. It is best to use the attachment manager or a picture hosting service to upload images for the time being


Wow .. you got eyes like a hawk! :) That was exactly it.
Thanks for the correct.

regards,ventrical

---
